# Sortify

> Free, open-source web app that sorts your Spotify playlists by genre. It reads a playlist, detects each track's genre from Last.fm tags, and splits it into clean new playlists. No signup beyond Spotify login, no ads.

Sortify is privacy-friendly and open source. Users connect with Spotify (OAuth), pick a playlist, and Sortify generates new genre-based playlists in their account. The interface is available in 14 languages.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.sortify.fr/): What Sortify does, how it works, supported genres, FAQ, and the Spotify connect entry point.

## Notes

- Authentication is handled entirely through Spotify OAuth; Sortify stores no passwords.
- Genre detection relies on Last.fm tags for the tracks in a playlist.
- The dashboard, sorting, and playlist-creation flows are only available after signing in with Spotify.
